sub_topic: Surface area of a triangular/trapezoidal prism
question_text: Which quantity is needed, in addition to the prism length, to find the surface area of a prism?
option_a: The total area of the two end faces and the lateral faces
option_b: Only the volume of the prism
option_d: Only the area of one rectangular face
explanation: Surface area requires the total area of every outside face.
